free_text: Product yields for the photofission of 235U with 12-,
15-, 20-, 30-, and 70-MeV bremsstrahlung
U3O8 target (15 mg/cm2 thick) on a 1 mm thick Al.
The target was followed by a 0.1 mm thick Al catcher
foil with a purity of 99.999% at a distance of 1 mm
from the target.
Radiochemical procedure for Cd and I
